title: Attacking the Uncastled King
summary: A king in the center is a target

steps.title: Why Centralized Kings Die
steps.text: A king stuck in the center is exposed to attacks from both sides. If your opponent delays castling, open the position — pry open the e-file with pawn breaks, rip the king out with sacrifices. Speed is essential.

steps.title: The Recipe
steps.text: Open files aimed at the king. Sacrifice pawns to blast lines. Bring all pieces to the attack. Don't worry about material — you win when the king dies, regardless of piece count. Morphy was the master.
